headline: How The Investment Story For Raytheon Technologies (RTX) Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Reset
summary: RTX is at the center of a reset in analyst price targets, with one research firm moving up to US$240 while others trim their numbers, even as a model fair value of $215.27 per share remains unchanged. These shifts reflect a split narrative in recent research, where some analysts focus on product opportunities such as the PW1100G Section Plus upgrade, while others take a more cautious view and lower their targets. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these moves and track the evolving...

headline: Defense Stocks Hit Pause As Trump's Pentagon Remakes Military Industrial Complex
summary: Fast-moving defense stocks have stalled. Depleted weapons supplies and Pentagon budget questions leave the sector's future unclear.

headline: Northrop Grumman Secures Navy Contract for GQM-163A Target Support
summary: NOC wins a $100M Navy contract to support GQM-163A target production and launch ops, running through May 2031.

headline: Brokers Suggest Investing in RTX (RTX): Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), RTX (RTX) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?
